name: OSHA fine site but denied my comp—related?
description: Evidence for suits/appeals, not comp approval.[1]

mainEntity.name: OSHA fine site but denied my comp—related?

acceptedAnswer.text: Evidence for suits/appeals, not comp approval.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **OSHA violations prove negligence for third-party but comp separate.** Utah uses them as evidence.[1][4] Key factors: (1) Comp no-fault; (2) violations shift fault; (3) appeal comp with them; (4) public records.[3] Request OSHA report, bolster appeal, pursue suits. Strengthens all claims.
